title: Verify existing CORS middleware implementation
description: The CORS middleware implementation already exists at src/middleware/cors-middleware.ts and src/middleware/cors-middleware.test.ts. The implementation includes: createCorsMiddleware factory with full CorsOptions support (origin, methods, allowedHeaders, exposedHeaders, credentials, maxAge), NextRequest/NextResponse compatibility matching the existing middleware interface, and comprehensive unit tests covering all options and edge cases. Verification confirms the implementation meets all acceptance criteria.
existing_patterns: src/middleware/rate-limiter.ts: Factory pattern (createXxxMiddleware) returning (request: NextRequest) => NextResponse middleware function
src/middleware/request-logger.ts: Express-style middleware interface compatible with Next.js App Router
